---
title: "To be determined"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
---



## Qualitative research, 1

-   Five main approaches
    -   Phenomenology
    -   Grounded theory
    -   Ethnography
    -   Case study
    -   Narrative

## Qualitative research, 2

-   Format
    -   Focus group
    -   Interview
    -   Secondary data
    
## Quantitative research, 1

-   Three main approaches
    -   Randomized trials
    -   Quasi-experimental
    -   Observational
    
## Quantitative research, 2

-   Format
    -   Secondary data analysis
    -   Questionnaires

::: notes

:::
